# Pota Studio
> Italian full-service marketing agency from Bergamo. We help international brands grow through paid media, social, content, influencer marketing, TikTok LIVE, and Shopify development. Trusted by Samsung, Isybank and Cookies Digital.

## Brand
- Legal name: Anyped S.R.L. (operating as Pota Studio)
- HQ: Via Zanica 85, Bergamo 24126, Italy
- VAT: IT04545460166
- Languages served: English, Italian
- Markets: Italy, Europe, United States
- Contact: ciao@potastudio.com

## Services
- Paid Advertising — Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, Google Ads, programmatic; full-funnel campaigns with creative, media buying, and ROAS optimisation.
- Social Media Marketing — strategy, content production, community management, organic growth on TikTok, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube.
- Content Production — short-form video, photo, motion design, branded content, UGC orchestration.
- Influencer Marketing — creator strategy, talent sourcing, contract negotiation, end-to-end campaign management.
- TikTok LIVE & Live Shopping — host casting, production, real-time selling for retail and D2C brands.
- Web Design & Development — Shopify storefronts, landing pages, brand sites built on Next.js.
- Brand Representation — fractional in-market presence for non-Italian brands entering Italy / EU.

- [Home](https://www.potastudio.com): Agency overview, clients, services summary
- [Services](https://www.potastudio.com/services): Full list of services and engagement models

- [Clients](https://www.potastudio.com/clients): Brands we have served

- [Careers](https://www.potastudio.com/careers): Open positions
- [Contact](https://www.potastudio.com/contact): Project briefs and partnerships

## Authors
- [Sebastian Bonfanti — Founder & CEO](https://www.potastudio.com/author/sebastian-bonfanti): Strategy and creative lead at Pota Studio. Writes about paid advertising, influencer marketing, TikTok, and e-commerce. Italian counterpart at /it/autore/sebastian-bonfanti.
